description: The canonical DispatchSaveRequest type in workflows.ts line 61-65 specifies the return type as Promise<Result<NoteFileSaved, NoteSaveFailed>>. The implementation in dispatch-save-request.ts line 48 returns Promise<Result<NoteFileSaved, SaveError>>. These are different error types: NoteSaveFailed is a domain event (with kind, noteId, reason, occurredOn), while SaveError is a structured error (with kind: 'fs', reason: FsError). The implementation's return type does not conform to the canonical workflow type.
